title: Silicone Sealant - Flexible Silicone Tube for Wood, Parquet, Bathroom, Sink, Windows - Multi-Purpose, Waterproof (Transparent, 50ml)
features: NO SILICONE GUN NEEDED - 50ml silicone tube for quick, mess-free application. Perfect as bathroom sealant, kitchen sealant, shower sealant, window sealant, sink sealant, aquarium sealant, bath sealant and more

EXCELLENT FOR WOOD APPLICATIONS - Silicone sealant has outstanding performance in bonding parquet, mounting wood panels, doors, windows, mouldings, and decorative timbers. Also ideal for use on wooden furniture, cupboards, wardrobes, and staircases
RELIABLE SEAL FOR EVERYDAY USE - Provides a tight, water-resistant seal for general indoor applications, helping surfaces stay clean and protected longer
100% WATERPROOF & FLEXIBLE - Silicone tube provides a strong, watertight seal that stays flexible, perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, sinks, trays, showers, and wet rooms
LOW SHRINKAGE - Mastic sealant has low shrinkage (<15%) and smooth appearance make it suitable for high-end DIY projects and visible areas
description: Product Description Chemical Anchor Expanding Foam Fire Cement Roof Sealant Pipe Thread Sealant Marine Sealant.
